---
title: "Graphical View"
pagetitle: "WISSPAR — Graphical View"
page-layout: full
include-in-header:
  text: |
    <script>document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded",function(){document.body.classList.add("graphical-view-page");});</script>
---

::: {.dashboard-intro}
Interactively compare **immunogenicity** — antibody concentration (GMC) and
functional activity (OPA) — across pneumococcal conjugate vaccines, serotypes,
age groups, schedules, and sponsors. Use the filters on the left to build a
comparison; the ratio tabs show head-to-head immunogenicity between a reference
and a comparator product.

::: {.wisspar-caveat}
Data on immunogenicity alone cannot be used to infer differences in
effectiveness between vaccines, and assays differ between sponsors. See
[About](about.qmd) for guidance on interpreting these data.
:::
:::

::: {.dashboard-shell}
::: {#wisspar-app data-data-url="data/wisspar_export.json"}
:::
:::

```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/app/wisspar.css">
<script type="module" src="assets/app/wisspar.js"></script>
```
